description: F4.1 — STANDARD mapping from the 19 PrimaryEmotion of Pathos (v5) to probes of the 171-emotion library (Lindsey et al. 2026, Anthropic). Used by Advanced mode (default). Composite vectors use uniform 1/N weights, matching the paper-aligned pattern shown in RESIDUUMREWORK.txt L515-517 (e.g. 'pride = sum(proud + triumph + self-confident) / 3').
criteria: Composites approved only when intra-cluster cosine >= 0.15 measured on qwen3_4b_171.npz probes. Below that threshold the entry falls back to 1-a-1 with the probe closest to the Pathos VAD-C profile (engine/generator.py EMOTION_PROFILES). 1-a-1 also chosen when proposed composite probes have low or negative pairwise cosine (vectors would cancel).

notes.frustration: Reduced from 3 to 2 (frustrated+exasperated, dropped irritated). Intra cosine 0.16 borderline; 2 probes keep coherence.
notes.fear: Reduced from 3 to 2 (afraid+frightened, dropped scared). Intra 0.18; scared was near-redundant with afraid.
notes.anxiety: Reduced from 3 to 2 (anxious+worried, dropped nervous). Intra 0.16; nervous is milder and dilutes.
notes.sadness: 1-a-1 (sad). Intra cosine 0.085 — sad/unhappy/melancholy are nearly orthogonal in residual space, composite dilutes signal.
notes.helplessness: weary replaces trapped (cluster shame, A=0.60 too high). New composite arousal ~0.22 aligned with Pathos profile A=0.20.
notes.disappointment: 1-a-1 (unhappy). Intra cosine -0.06 — unhappy/gloomy/regretful CANCEL each other vectorially in residual space.
notes.surprise: 1-a-1 (surprised). Intra 0.091; shocked has V=-0.3 which contradicts Pathos profile V=+0.05.
notes.contemplation: 1-a-1 (reflective). Dropping brooding (V=-0.4) which inverted the Pathos profile sign (V=+0.15).
notes.mixed: No steering: conflict internal state — applying any direction would lie.
